explanation: This command simulates a typical execution of LaZagne with the 'all' module, which is flagged by the Sigma rule. It uses a common Windows directory (Temp) to align with the rule's Image path detection logic.
This command uses the 'Public' directory as a common location and substitutes 'all' with '-all' to test if the Sigma rule detects alternative flag syntax.
This command uses the 'Windows\Temp' directory and the 'browsers' module to test if the Sigma rule detects module-specific flags.
This command uses a nested path in AppData\Local\Temp and substitutes 'browsers' with '-browsers' to test if the Sigma rule detects alternative flag syntax.
This command uses the 'Downloads' directory and the '-credman' flag to test if the Sigma rule detects specific credential-related flags.
